title: Miso-Glazed Bresaola Tacos
description: A fusion of japanese flavors with venezuelan cuisine, these miso-glazed bresaola tacos are a unique twist on traditional tacos

ingredients.name: Marinated peppers
ingredients.notes: such as pimentos or bell peppers

instructions: 2. In a small saucepan, whisk together miso paste and 2 tbsp water until smooth.
3. Add marinated peppers to the miso glaze and stir to combine.
4. Place bresaola on a baking sheet and brush with miso glaze.
5. Roast in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until caramelized.
6. Warm tacos shells according to package instructions.
7. Assemble tacos by placing roasted bresaola onto a shell, followed by a spoonful of marinated peppers and a sprinkle of cilantro.
8. Serve immediately, with lime wedges and aji amarillo on the side.
